creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
The index (scripts) listing on the left hand side is
NON-adjustable. When opening deskutils/gucharmap, all
that is seen are the first 3 to 4 characters of the
scripts in the left hand column. So it impossible to
choose a script on sight. You are forced to scroll
through the list. This is just plain wrong, and wasn't
a problem in the past. Older versions provided a "grip"
in the middle (vertically) of the vertical bar that
separates the 2 columns. Looking at the source, I'm
inclined to suspect the use of cairo. As applications
I use that are built against poppler don't seem to
exhibit this loss of use/ability.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
